name: Arma 3
description: Experience true combat gameplay in a massive military sandbox. Deploy with a wide variety of single- and multiplayer content, a massive arsenal of modern weapons and vehicles, and limitless opportunities for content creation. Authentic, diverse, open - Arma 3 sends you to war.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core quad-core or AMD Athlon quad-core
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7850 or Intel HD Graphics 4000, with 1 GB video memory
  • DirectX®: 10
  • Storage: 50 GB available space
  • Audio: DirectX® compatible
  • Other: Internet connection and free Steam account to activate
    Dual Layer compatible when installing from DVD
